bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: 4Q26 top line (sales and comparable sales) missed Goldman Sachs and consensus estimates.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Sales decreased -1.0% y/y to $13.8bn and enterprise comparable sales decreased -0.8% y/y, below the GS estimate of +1.2% and consensus of +0.1%.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: FY27 guidance for revenue, comparable sales, and adjusted EPS is below consensus expectations.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: BBY introduced FY27 guidance, including revenue of $41.2bn-$42.1bn (vs. consensus of $42.2bn), comparable sales of -1.0% to +1.0% (vs. consensus of +1.4%), adj. EBIT margin of 4.3% to 4.4% (vs. consensus 4.3%), and adj. EPS of $6.30-$6.60 (vs. consensus of $6.63).

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Domestic online comparable sales decreased year-over-year.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Domestic online comparable sales decreased -2.3% y/y and accounted for 39.0% of domestic sales, up from 39.5% during the prior year.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Enterprise, domestic, and international comparable sales all decreased year-over-year and missed estimates.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Enterprise comparable sales decreased -0.8% y/y (vs. GS/consensus of n+1.2%/+0.1%) as domestic comparable sales decreased -0.8% (vs. GS/consensus of +1.2%/+0.3%) and international comparable sales decreased -1.3% (vs. GS/consensus of +1.3%/+1.7%).

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Lower product margin rates offset growth in other areas, leading to an approximately flat gross margin rate.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: The approximately flat gross margin rate included growth in Best Buy Ads and Marketplace, which was largely offset by lower product margin rates.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Inventory increased while sales decreased, indicating potential inventory management issues or slowing demand.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Inventory increased +2.9% y/y (vs. sales of -1.0%), and the payables ratio decreased to 90.7% from 97.9% in the prior year and compares to 91.6% during 3Q26.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: The payables ratio decreased significantly, which could imply less favorable payment terms or faster payments to suppliers, impacting cash flow.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: the payables ratio decreased to 90.7% from 97.9% in the prior year and compares to 91.6% during 3Q26.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Demand for consumer electronics remains pressured for longer than expected, weighing on top line and margin.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Downside risks include if demand for consumer electronics remains pressured for longer than expected, weighing on BBY’s top line and margin

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: The upgrade/replacement cycle for products is deferred for longer than normal, limiting potential sales growth.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if the upgrade/replacement cycle is deferred for longer than normal, limiting BBY’s potential sales growth

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Innovation fails to drive demand, or the level of innovation is less than expected.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if innovation fails to drive demand, or if the level of innovation is less than expected

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: The broader macro environment continues to weigh on demand for higher-ticket items.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if the broader macro environment continues to weigh on demand for higher-ticket items

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Loss of market share to other retailers, particularly online-only retailers.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if BBY loses share to other retailers, particularly online-only retailers

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Industry-wide promotional levels increase, weighing on gross margin.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if industry-wide promotional levels increase, weighing on gross margin

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Wage and other costs are higher than expected, driving further operating margin compression.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if wage and other costs are higher than expected, driving further operating margin compression

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Consumers trade down into lower-priced products or seek value at other retailers.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: if consumers trade down into lower-priced products and or seek value at other retailers

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Shrink increases, creating a more intense margin headwind.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: and if shrink increases, creating a more intense margin headwind.
